title: Ascension
description: Ascension is a mod about Ascending to god hood! Through cultivation! (No not farming plants xD)
body:
### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1352486/description_726ee86e-3513-4484-ac6a-90522085e289.png) *** ## **📖 About:** __**Ascension**__ brings you into the world only heard of in legends! The ancient world of the Jianghu in this world you will face many extreme dangers but also a lot of opportunities the become the strongest Immortal! **The Cultivation System** Explore the myriad of paths available to you, from cultivation your sword to the heavens itself. There are 3 main paths you can cultivate: * **Body Cultivation:** To cultivate Body you need to recieve damage. (Min 10 dmg) * **Essence Cultivation:** To cultivate Essence it is a keybind that you press down. * **Soul Cultivation****:** To cultivate soul (W.I.P) And any element, weapon or concept you ecnounter in game can be culitivated.    * **Physiques:** There exist physiques that can be aquired from loot chests and special natural phenomenon! Physiques softlock your Cultivation Paths so some physiques might only allow Body cult or Essence and Body. Some might also unlock other paths early **Mod Features** * **Bloodlines:** Bloodlines also exist which will effect stats and other stuff inherent to the bloodline! (Further expanded on when completed) * **Alchemy System:** You can make pills and eat herbs that will increase Cultivation and more! There also exist poison system being worked on so you can poison other players/mobs with included Antidotes! * ~~**Formations/Arrays:** You can also make Formations that will do a handfull of stuff such as speeding up cultivation for all paths, Hiding player names from others, opening air pockets under water, shields to shield your bases!~~ * ^^ D**isabled until further notice starting from next update** * **New Structures & Biomes:** Explore loads of different Structures & Biomes to find all the good opportunities! (Biomes W.I.P) * **Mobs & NPCs:** Find all the new creatures and npcs to kill or trade with! (NPCs & Mobs W.I.P) **The Choices** Will you be on the Orthodox, Unorthodox or the Demonic side of the Jianghu, The choice is all up to you! *** [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1352486/description_a7b2f4a8-05d4-4e38-815e-66ad64f4b87b.png)](https://github.com/MrEizy/Ascension)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1352486/description_ee3687d5-ffcb-4fd3-b164-1e4a0f81eb5a.png)](https://discord.gg/vev75fX2wq) *** ## **📦 Installation** ### Required * [**EasyGUI**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easygui) * [**Formation/Arrays**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/formation-arrays) * **^^ (disabled until further notice starting from next update)** * [**Builder's Zenith**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/builders-zenith) ### Highly Recommended * Using [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei), [REI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-items) or [EMI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emi) * Using [Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) * Using [Modopedia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modopedia) *** ## **📃 Upcoming Features (in Development):** **New Biomes & World Overhaul** * **Worldgen Overhaul:** We will be adding a new world type in future to make the mod fit better with minecraft. * **Biomes:** Loads of new and cool biomes will come to the mod that will introduce very rare biomes and more common ones too! * **Structures:**  * **Sects:** Sects will spawn in the world that has NPCs that can be traded with but also learn from! * **Abandoned Sects:** Abandoned Sects are sects that has been forgotten by time or been destroyed! * **Tombs:** Variety of tombs that spawn which houses challenges scaling to your Cultivation Realm! * **Battlefields:** Ancient Battlefields Where wars were fought! * **Holy Grounds:** Specific Structures that cause a + on cultivation bonus depending on the structure! * **Techniques:** Loads of new techniques will be added with time * **Physiques:** Loads of new physiques will be added with time * **Bloodlines:** Some bloodlines will be added and they will feature 3D features and bloodline specific skills! * **Skills:** We will be adding hopefully a lot of new skills in the future that will complement techniques, physiques and (or) bloodlines! * **Auctioning System:** Auction House feature will be added to introduce an economy but not just limited to players some NPCs will be able to auction stuff in it too! undefined ***

**Join Our Community Discord! Do join our [Official Discord](https://discord.gg/vev75fX2wq).**

**You can find like minded people and possibly make a sect with them!**

  [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1007/381/v-hgj-_v1.png)](https://ko-fi.com/perfectascension) **![](https://www.dropbox.com/s/bh13qlac2wzhftq/sC6L3HF.png?dl=1)**
